---
title: "Data in life"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, reading-time]
  categories: true
  feed: 
    categories: [R, Python]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

**🌟Blog status🌟**

Welcome to my blog on selected cheminformatics, machine learning and data science projects in drug discovery.

-   Next project in the pipeline - A note on using Marimo notebook in Quarto blog

<br>
